summary: Operator permission feature testing completed successfully. All backend APIs and frontend UI working correctly for store-based access control.
passed_tests: Users API returns permission fields (allowed_region_ids, allowed_city_ids, allowed_store_ids) - PASSED
Operator has Forum Kadikoy store permission - PASSED
Operator sees 1 store (Forum Kadikoy only) in /api/reports/summary - PASSED
Permission update API works correctly - PASSED
Admin dashboard shows 2 stores (Forum Kadikoy + Test Mağaza 2) - PASSED
Operator dashboard shows 1 store (Forum Kadikoy only) - PASSED
Users page shows permission summary badges - PASSED
Edit user dialog has permission section with Regions/Cities/Stores checkboxes - PASSED
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Added permission fields to UserResponse, UserCreate, UserUpdate models and update_user endpoint
seed_data_creation: Operator user has Forum Kadikoy store (ID: 16d18512-6191-4f60-8425-595d9da0ec0f) permission set
context_for_next_testing_agent: Operator permission feature fully tested. Backend uses get_user_allowed_stores() function in permissions.py to filter data. Admin with no restrictions sees all stores. Operator sees only stores in allowed_store_ids. Permission fields: allowed_region_ids, allowed_city_ids, allowed_store_ids. Edit user dialog has permission section with checkboxes for regions, cities, and stores.

features_verified.admin_sees_all_stores: Admin dashboard shows 2 stores (Forum Kadikoy + Test Mağaza 2)
features_verified.operator_sees_authorized_only: Operator dashboard shows 1 store (Forum Kadikoy only)
features_verified.permission_summary_badge: Users page shows 'Tüm mağazalar' for admin and '1 mağaza' for operator
features_verified.edit_dialog_permissions: Edit user dialog has Erişim Yetkileri section with Bölgeler, Şehirler, Mağazalar checkboxes
features_verified.api_filtering: All live data APIs (/api/reports/summary, /api/live/counter, /api/live/queue) filter data based on user permissions
